translation_2: When meeting people they don't know, the child is very shy.
translation_3: He was very shy when he was young.

translation_1: She was so bashful that her face turned red.
sentence_2: 害羞的他不好意思开口。
translation_2: He was too bashful to speak up.
sentence_3: 她在人多的地方感到害羞。
translation_3: She feels bashful in crowded places.

translation_1: I went home during winter vacation.
translation_2: What do you plan to do during winter vacation?
translation_3: Winter vacation lasts one month.

translation_1: Winter in the north is extremely frigid.
translation_2: The weather today is very frigid.
sentence_3: 寒冷的冬天让人不想出门。
translation_3: The frigid winter makes people not want to go outside.

translation_1: He yelled loudly: Get up!
translation_2: The teacher yelled at the students to be quiet.
translation_3: He was yelling outside; I heard it.

sentence_1: 她在门口喊了我的名字。
translation_1: She called out my name at the door.
translation_2: Mom called out for me to come home for dinner.
translation_3: He called out loudly for his friend to come help.

translation_1: After running, I sweated a lot (perspiration).
translation_2: There is a lot of perspiration on his face.
translation_3: The weather is hot; I am producing perspiration.

translation_1: After exercise, I was covered in sweat.
translation_2: His palms are sweating.
translation_3: Wipe off your sweat.

sentence_1: 我今天有一个航班要赶。
translation_1: I have a scheduled flight to catch today.
translation_2: This scheduled flight departs from Beijing.
translation_3: His scheduled flight was delayed.

translation_1: May I ask what this flight number is?
translation_2: My flight number is CA001.
translation_3: Please check your flight number again.

translation_1: Exercise has benefits for the body.
translation_2: Going to bed early and waking up early has many benefits.
translation_3: What are the benefits of this method?

sentence_1: 住在学校附近有很大的好处。
translation_1: Living near school has a big advantage.
translation_2: There are many advantages to learning a foreign language well.
translation_3: What are the advantages of this plan?

translation_1: Please sleep well.
translation_2: You need to take care of yourself well.
translation_3: He completed the work well.

sentence_1: 你要好好看书，不要粗心。
translation_1: You should read carefully, don't be careless.
translation_2: Please check it carefully once more.
translation_3: He thought carefully before answering.

translation_1: Please speak to him nicely.
sentence_2: 她好好地穿上了新衣服。
translation_2: She dressed herself up nicely in new clothes.
translation_3: Tidy up the room nicely.

translation_1: You need to eat properly.
translation_2: He properly finished his homework.
sentence_3: 请好好地帮助每位客人。
translation_3: Please help every customer properly.

sentence_1: 他竟然说了这种话，真好笑！
translation_1: He actually said something like that — how ridiculous!
translation_2: This excuse is too ridiculous.
translation_3: His idea is really ridiculous.

translation_1: That movie is very funny.
translation_2: The joke he told was very funny.
translation_3: The child's appearance is really funny.
